text.title: Persona Building Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed in real deployments of Persona Building. Each ties a symptom to a root cause and a concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Primary persona is 'busy professionals' (no jobs, no pains).
antipattern.fix: Force JTBD-first phrasing; reject persona without a job statement.

antipattern.symptom: Persona built from one interview with the founder's friend.
antipattern.root-cause: Recruiting fatigue; took the convenient sample.
antipattern.fix: Enforce N>=5 cross-interview quote floor; reject persona at audit pass.

antipattern.symptom: Only primary + secondary shipped; no negative.
antipattern.root-cause: Author skipped uncomfortable 'who we reject' work.
antipattern.fix: Ship the negative persona alongside primary + secondary; without it churn rises.
Force ranked top-3; pain #1 drives onboarding copy.
